summary: telly's TEST-FR-001 claims independently reproduced: 4 DB tests RED [TEST-FR-001] on DB-down, real-assertion GREEN on DB-up @3407; 3 source mutations killed all 4 (assertions execute, no short-circuit); B4 DB-free both ways; no missed vacuous site. 0 BLOCK, 0 WARN, 1 INFO.

findings.claim: Header doc comment says 'Skipped automatically when test-bed is not up (isAvailable() guard)' — and the same in timeoutAbortConsequences.test.js:59-60
findings.evidence: Behavior was converted to hard-fail: DB_PORT=9999 run shows the 4 DB tests FAIL with [TEST-FR-001] (not skip). The doc comment now misdescribes behavior. Cosmetic doc drift only — not a false pass; the assertions are real (mutation-killed).
findings.fix: On a future touch, update the stale 'Skipped automatically' comments to 'Hard-fails [TEST-FR-001] when DB unavailable'.

refers.why: stale 'skipped' doc comments in the two test files now misdescribe the hard-fail behavior (INFO, cosmetic)
